name: opl-doc-governance
description: OPL-native developer document lifecycle governance and software-engineering closeout skill. Includes the short opl-doc skill entry.

interface.shortDescription: OPL-native docs lifecycle and engineering closeout governance.
interface.longDescription: Provides OPL Doc and OPL Doc Governance skills plus doctor scripts for OPL family document lifecycle management, stale doc retirement, active/history/tombstone folding, and software-engineering closeout workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Doc Governance to audit this repo's docs lifecycle.
Generate an OPL family docs lifecycle work plan.
Review active docs for stale lifecycle pollution and tombstone candidates.
